source: YouTube official channel (live) + BBW press releases (KABU)

kabu.title: KABU — original animated series
kabu.note: Build-A-Bear's first original animated YouTube series (Build-A-Bear Entertainment + Foundation Media + Laughing Dragon Studios), kawaii art style, with a tie-in plush line. It passed 500K views within ~7 weeks of its Dec-26-2025 debut — a real surge in owned-content engagement. (500K+ is the last company-disclosed figure; there is no public live per-series counter.)

anchor_videos_source: YouTube search 'build a bear' by view count (live), May 2026

anchor_videos.title: i took my mom to build a bear for the first time
Turning my house into a Build a Bear FACTORY?!
POV you have build-a-bear at home!! (unboxing & review)
Build A Bear for Britain and Baylaa's birthday!!
Using my 'Dress to Impress' skills at Build A Bear

creators_note: Build-A-Bear has no single dominant fan channel (unlike Warhammer's painting scene); instead the brand surfaces as huge one-off videos across many creators — stuffing-station ASMR (25M), parody/comedy (17M), challenges and 'took my mom' vlogs — plus a long tail of adult-collector hauls and unboxings.
